name: BentPlateGeometrySolver.OperationStatus
summary: Define possible statuses for geometry creation/modification commands.

enum_values.name: PlateIntersectsWithIntersectionLine
enum_values.summary: Plate polygon extends beyond intersection line.

enum_values.name: FacesAtAnObtuseAngle
enum_values.summary: Faces to be connected are too steep of an angle.

enum_values.name: InvalidRadius
enum_values.summary: Cannot connect parts with a cylindrical section having the provided radius.

enum_values.name: InvalidFacePoints
enum_values.summary: Cannot create geometry from requested face points.
